title: Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 16GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1660
content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i5 2nd Gen
  • 2TB SATA Hard Drive
  • 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660
  • 16GB DDR3 RAM
  • 19" Refurbished Monitor

Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 16GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1660 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

Ram: 16GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT Beam RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i5
  • RAM: 16GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

Serpentine Duo Top Handle
content: Exuding a sophisticated and exclusive appeal, the Serpentine Duo tote bag combines jewellery-inspired details, evoking the serpent's sinuous movements, with an exceptional high-end workmanship. Masterfully crafted with a midnight plum Mosaic Embroidery applied into satin – a cascade of hand-sewn sequins in different sizes, shapes and shades results into a stunning play of lights and three-dimensional effect. Featuring two snake body-shaped handles embellished with engraved scales, whose design draws inspiration from a bold 1960s Serpenti Bvlgari watch, the model is made of a single open compartment, an internal flat pocket and a zipped pocket. 21.5 x 15 x 6 cm - 8.5 x 5.9 x 2.4 inches. Made in Italy.

content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i5 2nd Gen
  • 2TB SATA Hard Drive
  • 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660
  • 16GB DDR3 RAM
  • 19" Refurbished Monitor

Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 16GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1660 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

Ram: 16GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT Beam RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i5
  • RAM: 16GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.

  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce

2 Pack Photo Backdrop Board | 30x40 cm | Realistic Photography Background | Food Photography Background | Replica
content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • 【CREATE YOUR OWN HOME STUDIO】Why rent a studio when you can create beautiful product photography at home? Use the photo backdrop boards to create an instant professional background. Great for photographers, bloggers, artists, online sellers, and all other photo lovers!
  • 【TAKE PROFESSIONAL PHOTOS】Our 30x40 cm clear and realistic photo backdrop board will help you create high-quality images without the hassle of searching your home for good backgrounds! Perfect for shooting items such as food, cakes, jewellery, and much more. The possibilities are endless!
  • 【TWO IN ONE DESIGN】Stylish and versatile backdrop board with marble and cement designs. The double-sided panels can be mixed and matched to complement your products. Simply reverse the panels to create a new background board. (marble & cement)
  • 【EASY TO SET-UP】The kit includes 2 double sided panels and 4 sturdy brackets that are easy to set and store. Just insert the panels in the brackets, add your props, and you are ready to make perfect pictures. Don't worry if you make a mess, the waterproof surfaces are easy to clean!
  • 【QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST】We are dedicated to providing the best product and service to all our customers. If you are not happy with our product for any reason at all, please get in contact with us and we will happily refund your order – no questions asked.
